category.scope_note: Portable lithium battery cells, battery packs, and power banks (China export to Azerbaijan) compliance gap comparison.

title.en: China-to-Azerbaijan Lithium Battery & Power Bank Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入阿塞拜疆：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入阿塞拜疆：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of China lithium battery and power bank documentation against Azerbaijan requirements: AZSTAND import conformity, AZS/IEC 62133 safety references, EMC and radio expectations, UN 38.3 transport, Baku port entry requirements, and in-country importer requirement.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国锂电池/移动电源文件与阿塞拜疆要求对照：AZSTAND进口合规、AZS与IEC 62133安全依据、EMC与无线电要求、UN 38.3运输、入境港口、境内进口商制度。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國鋰電池/行動電源檔案與阿塞拜疆要求對照：AZSTAND進口合規、AZS與IEC 62133安全依據、EMC與無線電要求、UN 38.3運輸、入境港口、境內進口商制度。

disclaimer.en: For informational purposes only. Not legal advice. Regulations change; verify all requirements with qualified legal and technical advisors before export. This page does not constitute a certification decision, legal opinion, customs determination, or market-access approval.
disclaimer.zh: 仅供参考，不构成法律意见。法规可能变化，出口前请向具备资质的法律及技术顾问核实所有要求。本页不构成认证结论、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。
disclaimer.zht: 僅供參考，不構成法律意見。法規可能變化，出口前請向具備資質的法律及技術顧問核實所有要求。本頁不構成認證結論、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。

answer_first.en: Chinese lithium batteries and power banks entering Azerbaijan generally require local importer-led AZSTAND compliance handling, AZS or AZS-adopted IEC 62133 safety evidence, UN 38.3 transport documentation, and in-country importer readiness at Baku. Chinese GB 31241 and CCC are useful baseline inputs but are not alone sufficient for Azerbaijani market access.
answer_first.zh: 中国锂电池/移动电源进入阿塞拜疆通常需要由本地进口方推进的AZSTAND合规、AZS或AZS采纳的IEC 62133安全依据、UN 38.3运输文件及巴库口岸进口要求。中国GB 31241和CCC可作为基础参考，但不足以单独满足阿塞拜疆准入要求。
answer_first.zht: 中國鋰電池/行動電源進入阿塞拜疆通常需要由本地進口方推進的AZSTAND合規、AZS或AZS採納的IEC 62133安全依據、UN 38.3運輸文件及巴庫港口進口要求。中國GB 31241和CCC可作為基礎參考，但不足以單獨滿足阿塞拜疆准入要求。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Update rows and fragments when AZSTAND notices, AZS adoptions, customs notices, or UN model-regulation changes materially affect scope, required evidence, or entry-point processes.
